name: renata-fraga-landing
description: Landing page Renata Fraga Hair Spa — Grupo VIP

scripts.build:css: npx clean-css-cli -o dist/style.min.css assets/css/base.css assets/css/layout.css assets/css/animations.css assets/css/components.css assets/css/sections/hero.css assets/css/sections/social-proof.css assets/css/sections/expertise.css assets/css/sections/videos.css assets/css/sections/reline.css assets/css/sections/community.css assets/css/sections/cta-footer.css
scripts.build:js: npx terser assets/js/utils.js assets/js/animations.js assets/js/scroll.js assets/js/main.js -o dist/main.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && echo 'Build concluído em /dist'
